title: Aborted
lyrics: 808 cuts down How you duckin'? How you duckin'? Make the money feel Fucked up all my life And man I fucked up all my wife And now I fuckin' drank the bottle Man I'm throwin' it aside I got the plastic bag and maybe I should suffocate myself Or maybe I just got too much Inside my brain and maybe I need Help I need help Not if you're fine now Help I need help Not if you're fine though You see it's just a different disguise I rock it to it every night when you comin' to ride Rockin' the mind I just rockin' the mind I wanna see if you wanna ride Ride to the next shit Ride to the new shit ride with the new all night Maybe you know I'm rockin' right I'm gonna rock that shit It gon' be like fireworks inside your mind Fireworks inside your dime Your dime And I know I'm behind But you see you got one behind It's a hot You see Apple bottle bake it down and break it History Too much for the bill Too much for the year Too much for me Counting it Clear clear Fuck it now Clear clear Freestyle bitch This is how it I get down Are we clear Or are you fearing me Don't test the likes I tell you up and down It's just a mist of likes Acting acting like a decadent But I don't wanna be a domino On top of everything It's just the way I feature flows Break your money Take it funny Thanks to the DJ man I'll flip it rich It's like I quit talking to the people That made me not bless me Quit talking to the people That made me second guess me Seems like all 23 Are draping me Incite me Love me Make me fucking write me Write me down and splat me All into the next show Write me down and rock me Just into your elbow Me next to you Is it gonna be you Or me Or are you fantasy Don't worry I'm still here Come on No it's clear Open wide Got the bangers, got the hangers Got the reason why we're all here How bout it Aborted moment mine Aborted fuck behind Aborted sick demented mine You can't talk You're not welcome here You're just gone Alright You know you're gone

lyricsSegments.text: And man I fucked up all my wife
And now I fuckin' drank the bottle
I got the plastic bag and maybe
Or maybe I just got too much
Inside my brain and maybe I need
You see it's just a different disguise
I rock it to it every night when you comin' to ride
I just rockin' the mind I wanna see if you wanna ride
Ride to the new shit ride with the new all night
Maybe you know I'm rockin' right
It gon' be like fireworks inside your mind
But you see you got one behind
Apple bottle bake it down and break it
This is how it I get down
I tell you up and down
It's just a mist of likes
But I don't wanna be a domino
It's just the way I feature flows
It's like I quit talking to the people
That made me not bless me
That made me second guess me
Write me down and splat me
Write me down and rock me
Got the bangers, got the hangers
Got the reason why we're all here
